creator: bugzilla.freebsd@omnilan.de
text:
Strange.
It's been a plain new build-jail here.
Maybe PACKAGES interference (had lot of problems with PACKAGES defined and have local patches to work around some problems)...

As long as config-recursvie target works for you with net/samba48, I'll close this bug until I find some time to track it down.

Thanks,

-harry
